name: io.github.exchange-rateapi/mcp-server
title: Exchange Rate API
description: Live and historical foreign exchange rates for 160+ fiat currencies, sourced from Reuters/Refinitiv mid-market data. Tools: get_exchange_rate, get_historical_rates, get_rates, list_currencies.

environmentVariables.name: EXCHANGE_RATE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key from exchange-rateapi.com (free tier available, no credit card required)
